column14: RATM is an open-design FPV racing dataset with synchronized camera, IMU, command, battery-voltage, pose, and velocity CSVs. Use it for trajectory/voltage/control fitting; it is not a controlled drag test.
Open BOM and Betaflight backup for the RATM data-collection quadrotor. Some prop geometry is inferred from the T5147 model name and should be verified against the vendor page before force fitting.

MIT AERA aggressive-flight dataset with motor RPM/PWM, IMU, mocap ground truth, and rendered camera data. Use for trajectory/RPM/sensor-response checks rather than FPV airframe drag fitting.
High-speed quadrotor IMU/rotor-speed/VICON dataset. Use for rotor-speed-aided inertial dynamics and trajectory envelope checks.
